signatureMove.name: Hex
signatureMove.endStepEffect: If the enemy suffered no Wds during this round of melee, the enemy model gains [Deadwood Cursed: During the Discard Step, this character and all models friendly to this character within 3" suffer 1 Wd], until this character is slain.

abilities.name: Woodroot
abilities.description: This character may Jog over Wooded Patches.

abilities.name: Splintered Branches
abilities.description: If this character deals Impact or Piercing Melee Dmg, increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

abilities.name: Accursed
abilities.description: When an enemy targets this character with an arcane action you may reveal a [G]X from your hand before any cards are played. After resolving the current action, the enemy model suffers X-1 Wds where X is the value of the revealed card.

abilities.name: Vengence
abilities.description: If a friendly character is slain or reduced to 0 Wds, the first time this model uses an Arcane Ability this turn it doesn't need to spend any energy.

arcaneOutcomes.text: Target gains [Deadwood Cursed]: During the Discard Step, this character and all models friendly to this character within 3" of the target suffer 1 Wd, until this character is slain.
This character suffers 2 Wds. All other models within 3" suffer 2 Wds.
